title: Bronze and Tin
description: A mod that adds tin ore and bronze gear. Bronze gear is better than iron but not as good as diamond.
body:
## Features

 

• Tin ore

• Bronze ingot

• Bronze tools and armor

 

## How to Play

 

• Tin ore is found underground and can be mined with pickaxe

• Tin ore drops raw tin when mined

• Raw tin is smelted into tin ingots

• Tin ingots are smelted into molten tin

• Copper ingots are smelted into molten copper

• Molten tin and copper are crafted together to make bronze ingots

• Bronze ingots can be used to craft bronze tools and armor
